values.description: Base URL of the running esignet-service; must match MOSIP_ESIGNET_HOST
Token endpoint. Used as BOTH the client_assertion 'aud' and the DPoP 'htu' for the token request. Edit here instead of the pre-request scripts. Falls back to {{baseUrl}}/oauth2/token if empty.
PAR endpoint (FAPI2). Used as BOTH the par_client_assertion 'aud' and the DPoP 'htu' for Initiate PAR. Edit here instead of the pre-request scripts. Falls back to {{baseUrl}}/oauth2/par if empty.
UserInfo endpoint (FAPI2). Used as the DPoP 'htu' for Exchange Token for Userinfo. Falls back to {{baseUrl}}/oauth2/userinfo if empty.
Declarative app id (reserved; not sent by the current requests)
App id used for /flow/meta
Relying party id for Client Management > Create client
Bearer JWT for /client-mgmt/* (only needed if scope enforcement is enabled; leave empty otherwise)
ISO timestamp; set automatically by Create/Update client
Credentials-flow username (folder 2)
Credentials-flow password (folder 2)
MOSIP UIN used as the flow username (folders 1, 2, 3)
OTP value (folders 1, 3)
OAuth client id — set by Client Management > Create client; used by every flow (authorize / PAR / token)
RSA private JWK (no alg) — signs the private_key_jwt client assertion as RS256 (OTP/Credentials) or PS256 (FAPI2). Set by Create client.
RSA public JWK registered for the client. Set by Create client.
PKCE verifier; set per run
PKCE S256 challenge; set per run
PAR request_uri (FAPI2); set from the Initiate PAR response
DPoP JWK thumbprint (FAPI2); set by Initiate PAR
DPoP private JWK (FAPI2); generated by Initiate PAR, reused by token + userinfo
DPoP public JWK (FAPI2)
Flow execution id; set from the authorize redirect
Auth transaction id; set from the authorize redirect
Rolling flow challenge token; read AND rewritten at every /flow/execute step
Current flow action ref; updated at every /flow/execute step
KBA assertion returned by /flow/execute on COMPLETE; submitted to /oauth2/auth/callback. NOTE: this is the flow assertion, NOT the private_key_jwt client_assertion.
Authorization code from the auth callback
